name: fable-loop
description: A general-purpose autonomous agent loop: architect/builder role separation, fail-investigate-verify-distill iteration, independent verification, and short-map external memory.

interface.shortDescription: Run non-trivial tasks as a plan-build-verify-distill loop.
interface.longDescription: Fable Loop turns a non-trivial task into a disciplined cycle: plan, build, verify, distill. It keeps the architect role (spec + frozen gates) separate from the builder role (implementation), verifies the real artifact against frozen gates instead of trusting self-critique, and carries state in a short external-memory map instead of a context log that rots. Model-agnostic.
defaultPrompt: Run this as a fable loop.
Architect then build the X feature.
Use the self-correcting agent loop on this.
